title: Simulation SQL Draft Author Worker v1
determinism: Must derive SQL drafts only from declared simulation planning artifacts.
Must keep drafts outside infra/postgres/init until explicitly approved.
Must not write to AI-control roots.

notes: Draft scope may target timelines, checkpoints, cursors, tick ledger, or snapshot materializations.
Phase M allows draft SQL authoring only, not live apply.
Output is a draft pack only.
Future phases may promote approved drafts into live SQL surfaces.
